description: Registry of canonical Q&A corpus sources. PDFs / full texts are NEVER committed to git — the checked-in manifest lives here only so service operators and CI know what's expected inside the qa-corpus Storage bucket. The `qa-ingest` edge function expects each `id` to map to a row in `qa_bank.qa_sources` and the `storagePath` to exist inside the bucket.
